# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- For this project, use English consistently in code and UI text, with a modern WPF visual style themed around The Sopranos.
- Match UI pixel-perfect to Figma values and avoid default blue WPF hover/selected visuals; use theme-consistent dark/gold/red states and centered checkbox marks.
- In the Add/Edit rich-text toolbar, ensure selector rectangles are dark themed (fill #2A2A2A, stroke #4F4F4F 1px, Segoe UI 12 #B8B5AE) and that placeholders hide on focus/caret like other inputs.
- Modal/dialog buttons must not show any default light-blue hover state; keep all modal interactions in the custom dark/gold/red theme.
- Validation text under the Add/Edit description should align to the left edge of the description text area.
